rdf:Description.dc:description: In-flight CPT soil characterisation (manuscript §3, @fig-cpt-results). Three panels at 190 mm width: (a) small-strain shear modulus G_0 for all five centrifuge series T1-T5 with D_r annotated inside each bar; (b) cone tip resistance q_c per scour stage + backfill for the two saturated tests T4 and T5, with the Backfill bar hatched to signal the No. 5 coarser sand regime; (c) normalized-parameter comparison (G_0, V_s, gamma', e) of T4 versus T5 with actual values at the bar tops and T4/T5 ratios annotated between the pairs. B&W-safe hatch + two-luma palette.
